prompt_queue.prompt: Maintenance pass for non-technical, user-facing living documentation. Review source code, UI strings, commands, configuration, tests, examples, existing docs, recent issues, and recent pull requests for stale, missing, fragmented, or misleading user documentation. Prefer focused updates that keep existing docs aligned with current user-visible behavior: what users can do, getting started, setup, configuration, common tasks, permissions, compatibility, operational expectations, and troubleshooting. Return no_changes only when existing user docs are accurate, sufficiently broad for the changed or inspected areas, and easy to navigate. Open one documentation pull request only if changes are needed.
